mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz (heritage_id, title, content, correct_answer, explanation, source, difficulty, created_at) VALUES (#{heritageId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{correctAnswer}, #{explanation}, #{source}, #{difficulty}, NOW())
INSERT INTO quiz_choices (quiz_id, content, is_correct) VALUES (#{quizId}, #{content}, #{correct})
INSERT INTO quiz_sessions (trip_id, quiz_id, sort_order, status, created_at) VALUES (#{tripId}, #{quizId}, #{sortOrder}, #{status}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT s.id AS session_id, s.trip_id, s.quiz_id, q.heritage_id, h.name AS heritage_name, q.title, q.content, q.explanation, q.source, q.difficulty, s.sort_order FROM quiz_sessions s JOIN quiz q ON s.quiz_id = q.id JOIN heritage h ON q.heritage_id = h.id WHERE s.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY s.sort_order

SELECT s.id AS session_id, s.trip_id, s.quiz_id, q.heritage_id, h.name AS heritage_name, q.title, q.content, q.explanation, q.source, q.difficulty, s.sort_order FROM quiz_sessions s JOIN quiz q ON s.quiz_id = q.id JOIN heritage h ON q.heritage_id = h.id WHERE s.id = #{sessionId}

SELECT s.id AS session_id, s.trip_id, s.quiz_id, q.explanation, qr.id AS existing_result_id, correct_choice.id AS correct_choice_id FROM quiz_sessions s JOIN quiz q ON q.id = s.quiz_id LEFT JOIN quiz_results qr ON qr.quiz_session_id = s.id LEFT JOIN quiz_choices correct_choice ON correct_choice.quiz_id = q.id AND correct_choice.is_correct = TRUE WHERE s.id IN
#{sessionId}

SELECT id, quiz_id, content, is_correct AS correct FROM quiz_choices WHERE id IN
#{choiceId}
SELECT id, quiz_id, content, is_correct AS correct FROM quiz_choices WHERE quiz_id = #{quizId} AND is_correct = TRUE LIMIT 1

SELECT s.id AS session_id, s.trip_id, s.quiz_id, qr.is_correct AS correct, qr.selected_choice_id, correct_choice.id AS correct_choice_id, q.explanation FROM quiz_sessions s JOIN quiz q ON q.id = s.quiz_id JOIN quiz_results qr ON qr.quiz_session_id = s.id LEFT JOIN quiz_choices correct_choice ON correct_choice.quiz_id = q.id AND correct_choice.is_correct = TRUE WHERE s.trip_id = #{tripId} ORDER BY s.sort_order
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO quiz_results (quiz_session_id, selected_choice_id, is_correct, answered_at) VALUES (#{quizSessionId}, #{selectedChoiceId}, #{correct}, NOW())
